description_long: This is a young child with a bald head, standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hands relaxed at the sides. The child is dressed in a long-sleeve bodysuit featuring a graphic of bowling pins and a red bowling ball on the chest, paired with solid-colored shorts. The skin tone is a rich brown, and the feet are bare, with visible toes. The body proportions and facial features are consistent with a toddler or very young child. The clothing fits snugly, and there are no visible accessories or additional items carried. The overall appearance is clean and simple, suitable for an urban or casual environment.
description: A bald, barefoot young child stands upright in a long-sleeve bodysuit with a bowling graphic and shorts, arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the child's face, chest graphic of bowling pins and ball, and relaxed arms and hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, nose, and the fit of the bodysuit and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the plain back of the bodysuit, and the shorts covering the lower body.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the child's profile, arm position, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve bodysuit with a graphic print and shorts
